hero.role: Control & Automation Engineer · Ph.D. Researcher · AI/ML
hero.desc: Dedicated Control & Automation Engineer with hands-on expertise in PLC, SCADA, and control systems, combined with applied machine learning research. Driven by innovation, efficiency, and engineering excellence.
about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a dedicated Control and Automation Engineer with a First-Class Honours B.Sc. in Automation and Control Systems and an M.Sc. in Electrical Engineering from Yıldız Technical University. I am currently pursuing a Ph.D. in Control and Automation Engineering.
about.p2: My work bridges industrial automation — PLC, SCADA, and HMI systems — with applied machine learning and control system optimization. I'm passionate about building technologies that advance efficiency and sustainability.
skills.title: Skills & Expertise
research.title: Research & Publications
research.pub1.title: Wavelet-Enhanced Hybrid LSTM-XGBoost Model for Predicting Time Series Containing Unpredictable Events
research.pub1.desc: A hybrid forecasting framework combining wavelet decomposition with LSTM and XGBoost to improve prediction accuracy for volatile time series.
research.pub2.title: Comparison of Deep Learning Architectures to Evaluate the Effect of COVID-19 on Electricity Consumption
research.pub2.desc: A comparative study of deep learning architectures analyzing the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on electricity consumption patterns.
research.phd: Ph.D. focus area: Control and Automation Engineering — Yıldız Technical University (ongoing).
projects.title: Projects
projects.p1.title: Robotic Arm Design & Implementation
projects.p1.desc: Designed and implemented a functional robotic arm, covering mechanical design, actuation, and control system integration.
projects.p2.title: Wavelet-Integrated Forecasting Framework
projects.p2.desc: A time-series forecasting framework integrating wavelet transforms with machine learning models for robust prediction under uncertainty.
projects.p3.title: COVID-19 Electricity Consumption Study
projects.p3.desc: Applied and compared deep learning architectures to model the effect of the pandemic on national electricity consumption.
exp.title: Experience
exp.e1.desc: Supported instruction and laboratory work in control and electrical engineering courses.
exp.e2.desc: Worked on industrial automation solutions, PLC programming, and control system integration.
exp.e3.desc: Contributed to community initiatives and team-based volunteer programs.
exp.i2: SCADA, RTU, Master Station, Smart Grid
edu.title: Education
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.lead: Open to research collaborations, automation projects, and professional opportunities. Feel free to reach out.
